name: playwright-hybrid-framework
description: Showcase hybrid Playwright framework (TypeScript Page Object Model, JavaScript tests, Mochawesome reporting, Chai assertions).

scripts.test:web: cross-env TEST_SUITE=web mocha "tests/web/**/*.spec.js" --timeout 120000 --reporter mochawesome --require ts-node/register --require mochawesome/register --reporter-options reportDir=reports/web,reportFilename=report,json=true,html=true --exit
scripts.test:mWeb: cross-env TEST_SUITE=mWeb mocha "tests/mWeb/**/*.spec.js" --timeout 120000 --reporter mochawesome --require ts-node/register --require mochawesome/register --reporter-options reportDir=reports/mWeb,reportFilename=report,json=true,html=true --exit
scripts.test:all: npm run test:web && npm run test:mWeb

author: Hotstar SDETs / Showcase
